args: for p in ./plugins/unica/scripts/run-unica.sh ./scripts/run-unica.sh; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then exec "$p"; fi; done; echo 'Unica orchestrator launcher not found' >&2; exit 127
unica.note: Single public Unica stdio MCP orchestrator. It owns workspace/cache coordination and uses bundled build, code-analysis, standards, and XML/JSON DSL adapters internally.
